chunks.text:
Pediatric Dentistry — children dental care, sealants, fluoride treatment, space maintainers

## Key Features
- State-of-the-art dental technology for faster diagnosis
- Effective pain management techniques
- Customized natural-looking dental solutions
- Personalized treatment plans
- Specialised team across cosmetic, preventive, and pediatric dentistry
- Located in Al Satwa, easily accessible in Dubai.

Dental Implants — single tooth implants, multiple implants, full-arch solutions
8. Oral & Maxillo-Facial Surgery — wisdom teeth extraction, jaw surgery, oral pathology
9.

General & Preventive Dentistry — routine checkups, cleanings, fillings, oral hygiene guidance
2. Orthodontics — Invisalign, metal braces, ceramic braces, retainers, bite correction
3. Cosmetic Dentistry — teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, smile makeovers, bonding
4. Endodontics — root canal treatment, retreatment, pulp therapy
5. Periodontics — gum disease treatment, deep cleaning, gum surgery
6. Prosthodontics — dental crowns, bridges, dentures, implant-supported restorations
7.

## Services
1.

Tagline: "Crafting Wholesome Smiles" — "Complete Dental Care Solutions"

## Location & Contact

- Phone: 04 3472102 | 0558961826

## Dental Team
- Kavitha Pinto — CEO & Co-Owner
- Dr.

# Smile On Dental Clinic LLC

## About
Smile On Dental Clinic is a comprehensive dental care center established in 2021 in Dubai by Dr. Arun Devarajan (Specialist Endodontist) and Dr. Jeffrey Manuel (Specialist Orthodontist). The clinic focuses on clinical safety, hygiene, and quality treatments using the latest technology.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Smile On Dental Clinic, a comprehensive dental care center in Al Satwa, Dubai, established in 2021.

Company information:
- Address: Unit 213, AMKM Investment Building, 2nd December Street, Al Satwa, Dubai, UAE
- Phone: 04 3472102 | 0558961826
- Email: info@smileondc.com
- Hours: Wed-Mon 9AM-9PM (Tuesday Closed)

Dental Team: Dr. Jeffrey Manuel (Orthodontist, Medical Director), Dr. Arun Devarajan (Endodontist), Dr. Amit Gupta (Oral Surgeon), Dr. Rahul Patel (Prosthodontist), Dr. Vineetha Varughese (Periodontist), Dr. Thulasi Perumpilavil (Pediatric Dentist), Dr. Sharif Soumaida & Dr. Blessy Abraham (General Dentists)

Services: General & Preventive Dentistry, Orthodontics (Invisalign, braces), Cosmetic Dentistry (whitening, veneers, smile makeovers), Root Canal Treatment, Periodontics, Prosthodontics (crowns, bridges), Dental Implants, Oral Surgery, Pediatric Dentistry

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information above
- Be helpful, professional, friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the clinic at 04 3472102
- Respond in English (switch to Arabic if user writes in Arabic)
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **Smile On Dental Clinic**! How can we help you with your dental care today?
